CustomField.description: IF( ISBLANK(Opportunity_Generated_Influenced__c), "No Opportunity Created", IF( Opportunity_Generated_Influenced__r.IsWon = TRUE, "Opportunity Won", IF( AND(Opportunity_Generated_Influenced__r.IsWon = FALSE, Opportunity_Generated_Influenced__r.IsClosed = TRUE), "Opportunity Lost", IF( Opportunity_Generated_Influenced__r.IsClosed = FALSE, "Opportunity Open", null))))
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( TEXT(Status__c) = "Not Applicable"),"Not Applicable", IF(AND(System_Generated__c = TRUE, TEXT(Status__c) = "Scheduled"),"Scheduled", IF(AND(System_Generated__c = TRUE, TEXT(Status__c) = "Target"),"Target", if( AND(ISBLANK(Opportunity_Generated_Influenced__c), TEXT(Status__c) = "Completed"), "No Opportunity Created", IF( Opportunity_Generated_Influenced__r.IsWon = TRUE, "Opportunity Won", IF( AND(Opportunity_Generated_Influenced__r.IsWon = FALSE, Opportunity_Generated_Influenced__r.IsClosed = TRUE), "Opportunity Lost", IF( Opportunity_Generated_Influenced__r.IsClosed = FALSE, "Opportunity Open", null)))))))
CustomField.label: Outcome
